trans-unit.source: Network centrality measures and its application in QGIS
trans-unit.target: Network centrality measures and its application in QGIS

trans-unit.source: In chapter {ref}`content:references:module9:network-theory` we introduced the concept of spatial networks for the application of routing and accessibility. This chapter aims at extending our understanding of networks encompassing metrics to describe their shape, function and general properties.
trans-unit.target: In chapter {ref}`content:references:module9:network-theory` we introduced the concept of spatial networks for the application of routing and accessibility. This chapter aims at extending our understanding of networks encompassing metrics to describe their shape, function and general properties.

trans-unit.source: This chapter provides an overview on the following questions:
trans-unit.target: This chapter provides an overview on the following questions:

trans-unit.source: What are common network metrics
trans-unit.target: What are common network metrics

trans-unit.source: Degree centrality
trans-unit.target: Degree centrality

trans-unit.source: Betweenness centrality
trans-unit.target: Betweenness centrality

trans-unit.source: Closeness Centrality
trans-unit.target: Closeness Centrality

trans-unit.source: Eigenvector Centrality
trans-unit.target: Eigenvector Centrality

trans-unit.source: PageRank
trans-unit.target: PageRank

trans-unit.source: Clustering Coefficient
trans-unit.target: Clustering Coefficient

trans-unit.source: However we focus on betweenness and closeness centrality
trans-unit.target: However we focus on betweenness and closeness centrality

trans-unit.source: Betweenness
trans-unit.target: Betweenness

trans-unit.source: Betweenness centrality is a measure that quantifies the importance or influence of a node within a network by assessing the extent to which the node lies on the shortest paths between other pairs of nodes. In other words, it captures how frequently a node acts as a bridge or intermediary in connecting different parts of the network.
trans-unit.target: Betweenness centrality is a measure that quantifies the importance or influence of a node within a network by assessing the extent to which the node lies on the shortest paths between other pairs of nodes. In other words, it captures how frequently a node acts as a bridge or intermediary in connecting different parts of the network.

trans-unit.source: Graph representation: nodes & edges
trans-unit.target: Graph representation: nodes & edges

trans-unit.source: Directed and weighed graph
trans-unit.target: Directed and weighed graph

trans-unit.source: Betweenness centrality: Rank nodes/edges by their importance/influence for overall connectivity within the network (eg bridges, bridgeheads)
trans-unit.target: Betweenness centrality: Rank nodes/edges by their importance/influence for overall connectivity within the network (eg bridges, bridgeheads)

trans-unit.source: Limitations of standard betweenness centrality and modification
trans-unit.target: Limitations of standard betweenness centrality and modification

trans-unit.source: The following describes betweenness centrality in a standard and modified way exemplary.
trans-unit.target: The following describes betweenness centrality in a standard and modified way exemplary.

trans-unit.source: Shortest path between all nodes
trans-unit.target: Shortest path between all nodes

trans-unit.source: Betweenness centrality score represents the amount of visits at every node/edge
trans-unit.target: Betweenness centrality score represents the amount of visits at every node/edge

trans-unit.source: The more visits, the more central is a node/edge
trans-unit.target: The more visits, the more central is a node/edge

trans-unit.source: Limitation for specific analysis:
trans-unit.target: Limitation for specific analysis:

trans-unit.source: _How important is a single road segment for commuting_
trans-unit.target: _How important is a single road segment for commuting_

trans-unit.source: _How important is a single road segment for access towards healthcare_
trans-unit.target: _How important is a single road segment for access towards healthcare_

trans-unit.source: Modification: shortest paths between all nodes and subset
trans-unit.target: Modification: shortest paths between all nodes and subset

trans-unit.source: Departure: all nodes
trans-unit.target: Departure: all nodes

trans-unit.source: Destination: hospital
trans-unit.target: Destination: hospital

trans-unit.source: Limitation: Biased towards road network density.
trans-unit.target: Limitation: Biased towards road network density.

trans-unit.source: Further modification: shortest paths between subset and subset
trans-unit.target: Further modification: shortest paths between subset and subset

trans-unit.source: Departure: population centers
trans-unit.target: Departure: population centers

trans-unit.source: Destination: hospital
trans-unit.target: Destination: hospital

trans-unit.source: Possibility to include population counts as weights
trans-unit.target: Possibility to include population counts as weights

trans-unit.source: Population density is not uniform
trans-unit.target: Population density is not uniform

trans-unit.source: Demographics
trans-unit.target: Demographics

trans-unit.source: Application for identifying critical infrastructure
trans-unit.target: Application for identifying critical infrastructure

trans-unit.source: Research and paper publication conducted in 2021 on the influence of Cyclone Idai in Mozambique on the road network and access to healthcare facilities.
trans-unit.target: Research and paper publication conducted in 2021 on the influence of Cyclone Idai in Mozambique on the road network and access to healthcare facilities.

trans-unit.source: Utilized targeted betweenness centrality to assess changes in centrality scores of road segments.
trans-unit.target: Utilized targeted betweenness centrality to assess changes in centrality scores of road segments.

trans-unit.source: Considered flooded areas as impassable and examined the impact on centrality.
trans-unit.target: Considered flooded areas as impassable and examined the impact on centrality.

trans-unit.source: Used population centers as origins and healthcare facilities as destinations for centrality measurement.
trans-unit.target: Used population centers as origins and healthcare facilities as destinations for centrality measurement.

trans-unit.source: Identified roads that became more important for transportation towards healthcare services.
trans-unit.target: Identified roads that became more important for transportation towards healthcare services.

trans-unit.source: Demonstrated the crucial role of these roads in facilitating access to healthcare during natural disasters.
trans-unit.target: Demonstrated the crucial role of these roads in facilitating access to healthcare during natural disasters.

trans-unit.source: Highlighted the significance of targeted betweenness centrality in analyzing such scenarios.
trans-unit.target: Highlighted the significance of targeted betweenness centrality in analyzing such scenarios.

trans-unit.source: References
trans-unit.target: References

trans-unit.source: Petricola, S., Reinmuth, M., Lautenbach, S. et al. Assessing road criticality and loss of healthcare accessibility during floods: the case of Cyclone Idai, Mozambique 2019. Int J Health Geogr 21, 14 (2022). [https://doi.org/10.1186/s12942-022-00315-2](https://doi.org/10.1186/s12942-022-00315-2)
trans-unit.target: Petricola, S., Reinmuth, M., Lautenbach, S. et al. Assessing road criticality and loss of healthcare accessibility during floods: the case of Cyclone Idai, Mozambique 2019. Int J Health Geogr 21, 14 (2022). [https://doi.org/10.1186/s12942-022-00315-2](https://doi.org/10.1186/s12942-022-00315-2)

trans-unit.source: Zia M, Fürle J, Ludwig C, Lautenbach S, Gumbrich S, Zipf A. SocialMedia2Traffic: Derivation of Traffic Information from Social Media Data. ISPRS International Journal of Geo-Information. 2022; 11(9):482. [https://doi.org/10.3390/ijgi11090482](https://doi.org/10.3390/ijgi11090482)
trans-unit.target: Zia M, Fürle J, Ludwig C, Lautenbach S, Gumbrich S, Zipf A. SocialMedia2Traffic: Derivation of Traffic Information from Social Media Data. ISPRS International Journal of Geo-Information. 2022; 11(9):482. [https://doi.org/10.3390/ijgi11090482](https://doi.org/10.3390/ijgi11090482)

trans-unit.source: Klipper, I. G., Zipf, A., and Lautenbach, S.: Flood Impact Assessment on Road Network and Healthcare Access at the example of Jakarta, Indonesia, AGILE GIScience Ser., 2, 4, , 2021. [https://doi.org/10.5194/agile-giss-2-4-2021](https://agile-giss.copernicus.org/articles/2/4/2021/)
trans-unit.target: Klipper, I. G., Zipf, A., and Lautenbach, S.: Flood Impact Assessment on Road Network and Healthcare Access at the example of Jakarta, Indonesia, AGILE GIScience Ser., 2, 4, , 2021. [https://doi.org/10.5194/agile-giss-2-4-2021](https://agile-giss.copernicus.org/articles/2/4/2021/)

trans-unit.source: Closeness
trans-unit.target: Closeness

trans-unit.source: Closeness centrality is a measure that quantifies how easily a node in a network can reach other nodes, based on the inverse of the average shortest path distance from that node to all other nodes in the network.
trans-unit.target: Closeness centrality is a measure that quantifies how easily a node in a network can reach other nodes, based on the inverse of the average shortest path distance from that node to all other nodes in the network.

trans-unit.source: Determine the centrality of locations within a network based on efficient distance and time calculations for travel between different grid cell centroids in Rio.
trans-unit.target: Determine the centrality of locations within a network based on efficient distance and time calculations for travel between different grid cell centroids in Rio.

trans-unit.source: Grid-based analysis: Employed a 200m grid overlay on the city to divide the wider area into manageable units for analyzing mobility patterns and exposure
trans-unit.target: Grid-based analysis: Employed a 200m grid overlay on the city to divide the wider area into manageable units for analyzing mobility patterns and exposure

trans-unit.source: Motorized and pedestrian routing profiles: Calculated travel distance and time for each grid cell centroid, considering both motorized travel and pedestrian routing options.
trans-unit.target: Motorized and pedestrian routing profiles: Calculated travel distance and time for each grid cell centroid, considering both motorized travel and pedestrian routing options.

trans-unit.source: Purpose: Developed an exposure layer to understand human mobility patterns, particularly relevant for assessing the spread of vector-borne diseases like Dengue fever in Rio.
trans-unit.target: Purpose: Developed an exposure layer to understand human mobility patterns, particularly relevant for assessing the spread of vector-borne diseases like Dengue fever in Rio.

trans-unit.source: The analysis contributes to an exposure analysis by identifying individuals who may act as carriers of the disease, potentially getting bitten by a mosquito and infecting them, thereby aiding in disease prevention and control strategies.
trans-unit.target: The analysis contributes to an exposure analysis by identifying individuals who may act as carriers of the disease, potentially getting bitten by a mosquito and infecting them, thereby aiding in disease prevention and control strategies.
